creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
Created attachment 202852
Patch against /usr/ports

Portmaintainer here. See patch attached.

Passes on:
poudriere testport -j 112-release-amd64  -p dev -o devel/nexus2-oss
poudriere testport -j 112-release-i386  -p dev -o devel/nexus2-oss
poudriere testport -j 120-release-amd64  -p dev -o devel/nexus2-oss
poudriere testport -j 120-release-i386  -p dev -o devel/nexus2-oss

Already installed here in production.
